stadium_rules: No outside food or drinks allowed.
Bags must be clear plastic and no larger than 12x6x12 inches.
Smoking is only permitted in designated areas outside the main gates.

faqs.question: Where are the restrooms?
faqs.answer: Restrooms are located near every main gate and at the corner of each stand.

faqs.question: Is there a first aid station?
faqs.answer: Yes, first aid is located near Gate A.
